---
title: ""
format: html
page-layout: full
toc: false
css: custom2.scss
---

```{=html}
<div class="landing-container">

  <div class="landing-left">
    <img src="static/img/pic2.jpeg" alt="Julien Migozzi" />
    <div class="landing-socials">
      <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/jmigozzi.bsky.social" aria-label="Bluesky">
        <i class="fa-solid fa-cloud"></i>
      </a>
      <a href="https://github.com/jmigozzi" aria-label="GitHub">
        <i class="fab fa-github"></i>
      </a>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=TOQMW10AAAAJ&view_op=list_works&sortby=pubdate" aria-label="Google Scholar">
        <i class="fas fa-graduation-cap"></i>
      </a>
      <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0001-6896-8809" aria-label="ORCID">
        <i class="fab fa-orcid"></i>
      </a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="landing-text">
    <p>
      Welcome! I am an economic geographer and an <a href="https://www.devstudies.cam.ac.uk/staff/dr-julien-migozzi">Assistant Professor in Development Studies</a> at the University of Cambridge.<br><br> My research explores how digital capitalism reshapes markets, cities, and inequalities, combining qualitative and computational methods, and focusing on South Africa.
    </p>
  </div>

</div>
```
